Aviparko ← Back to site
Legal

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: June 2025  ·  Governing law: England & Wales

Plain English summary: You pay £19/month per car park. Aviparko takes a 5% platform fee from each driver payment, plus a 25p service charge paid by the driver. You receive the remainder automatically every morning. Either party can cancel at any time with no penalty.

1. Definitions

In these Terms:

  • "Aviparko" means the platform, its operator, and associated services available at aviparko.pages.dev and aviparko.co.uk
  • "Operator" means a business or individual who has registered a car park on the Aviparko platform
  • "Driver" means an end user who uses the Aviparko payment system to pay for parking
  • "Session" means a paid parking period initiated by a Driver
  • "Platform" means the Aviparko web application, operator dashboard, warden tool, and payment infrastructure

2. Eligibility and registration

To register as an Operator you must:

  • Be at least 18 years of age
  • Have the legal right to charge for parking at your site (whether as owner, lessee, or authorised agent)
  • Provide accurate information during registration
  • Complete Stripe Connect identity and bank account verification

Aviparko reserves the right to decline or suspend applications at our discretion.

3. Pricing and fees

Monthly subscription
£19
Per car park, per month
Platform fee
5%
Of each driver payment, deducted before payout
Service charge
25p
Per transaction, charged to the driver

The £19/month subscription is billed monthly per active car park. The 5% platform fee is deducted from each driver payment before it is paid out to the Operator. The 25p service charge is added to the driver's total at checkout and does not reduce Operator revenue.

Example: A driver pays £5.00 for parking. The driver pays £5.25 (including the 25p service charge). Aviparko deducts 5% (£0.25) and the Stripe processing fee, and the Operator receives the remainder. The Operator also pays £19/month separately.

Prices are exclusive of VAT where applicable. Aviparko reserves the right to change pricing with 30 days' written notice.

4. Payouts

Operator payouts are processed automatically via Stripe Connect at 06:00 GMT each day for the prior day's completed sessions. Payout timing is subject to Stripe's standard processing schedule, which is typically 2–3 business days after the charge date for new accounts, reducing as the account builds payment history.

Operators must maintain a valid, verified Stripe Connect account. Aviparko is not liable for payout delays caused by Stripe processing, bank processing times, or account verification issues.

5. Operator responsibilities

By using Aviparko, the Operator agrees to:

  • Display clear signage at the car park entrance and within the site, informing drivers that parking is subject to payment via QR code and that their vehicle details will be recorded
  • Display the Aviparko QR code prominently, in a weatherproof format, at each charging point
  • Inform drivers of parking terms including rates, maximum stay, and any enforcement measures, as required under the British Parking Association (BPA) or Independent Parking Committee (IPC) Code of Practice where applicable
  • Maintain the legal right to charge for parking and to issue Parking Charge Notices (PCNs) at the site throughout the contract period
  • Ensure accurate rate configuration in the operator dashboard. Aviparko is not liable for incorrect rates resulting from Operator configuration errors
  • Comply with all applicable laws including UK GDPR, consumer protection legislation, and any relevant parking industry codes of practice

6. Warden access and enforcement

The Aviparko warden tool provides real-time session verification only. Aviparko does not issue Parking Charge Notices, operate as a bailiff, or provide debt recovery services. The Operator is solely responsible for enforcement at their site, including the issuance and pursuit of any PCNs.

Warden PINs must be kept confidential. The Operator is responsible for all activity under their warden credentials.

7. Platform availability

Aviparko aims for high availability but does not guarantee uninterrupted service. Planned maintenance will be communicated where possible. Aviparko is not liable for lost revenue resulting from platform downtime, Stripe outages, or connectivity issues beyond our reasonable control.

Operators should maintain a contingency plan for periods of technical unavailability (for example, a contact number for manual payment arrangements).

8. Intellectual property

All platform software, design, copy, and branding is the intellectual property of Aviparko. Operators are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the platform for its intended purpose during the subscription period. No other rights are granted.

Operators must not reverse-engineer, copy, or resell any part of the platform.

9. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law:

  • Aviparko's total liability to an Operator in any calendar month shall not exceed the subscription fees paid in that month
  • Aviparko is not liable for indirect, consequential, or economic losses including loss of revenue, loss of data, or loss of business
  • Aviparko is not liable for the acts or omissions of Stripe, Supabase, Cloudflare, or any other third-party service provider

Nothing in these Terms limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any other liability that cannot be excluded by law.

10. Termination

Either party may terminate the Operator's subscription at any time with no notice period and no termination fee. Termination takes effect at the end of the current billing month — the Operator will not be charged for the following month.

Aviparko may terminate or suspend an account immediately if the Operator:

  • Breaches these Terms
  • Provides false information during registration
  • Uses the platform for unlawful purposes
  • Fails to maintain a valid Stripe Connect account

Upon termination, access to the operator dashboard will cease. Session records are retained for 7 years in line with financial regulations and made available on request.

11. Driver payments and refunds

Payments made by Drivers are processed by Stripe. Drivers with payment disputes should contact Aviparko at amirvieyra@yahoo.com. Refunds are assessed on a case-by-case basis against session records.

Aviparko does not process refunds for sessions where a driver has parked and the session data confirms a valid payment was made.

12. Changes to these Terms

Aviparko may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated to Operators by email with at least 14 days' notice. Continued use of the platform after the notice period constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

13. Governing law and disputes

These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

If you have a complaint, please contact us first at amirvieyra@yahoo.com. We aim to resolve all complaints within 5 business days.

14. Contact

For all enquiries relating to these Terms:

Aviparko
Email: amirvieyra@yahoo.com
Registered in England & Wales

© 2025 Aviparko. Registered in England & Wales.
